name: polymath
description: Local AI home assistant (Qt Quick + llama.cpp + whisper.cpp + ONNX Runtime)
comment: ONNX Runtime (GPU), llama.cpp, whisper.cpp and Piper are NOT taken from vcpkg. ONNX Runtime GPU is downloaded as a prebuilt package (see docs/BUILD.md); the inference sub-engines are vendored as git submodules under third_party/ and built with CUDA via add_subdirectory.
